_description: Code-specific QA test cases. Each query targets a precise code location — tests chunking quality and symbol extraction.

test_cases.query: Where is the FastAPI class defined and what parameters does its __init__ accept?
test_cases.description: Definition lookup — should find the FastAPI class constructor

test_cases.description: Call site lookup — should find usage, not definition
